{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/tasks/2322-260417-185340/plan.md","content":"# P3T30 Classification Plan

## Context

P3T30 is a Phase 3 test case in the Kody test-suite runner. It verifies that `@kody decompose` aborts and falls back to the normal pipeline when a sub-task fails (due to a missing `ioredis` dependency). The task described in the issue is to **implement a caching system** with four files, one of which (`src/cache/redisAdapter.ts`) requires `ioredis` (not installed in the app repo). The decompose command should split this into sub-tasks; when the Redis sub-task fails, decompose cleans up worktrees and falls back to `runPipeline()`.

The `taskify` stage (currently running) must analyze this task, identify sub-tasks, and hand off to the decompose planner.

---

## Task Classification

  "title": "Implement caching system with graceful decompose fallback",
  "description\… [+2680 chars]
